{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Torin
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Torin]] is [[Alin]]'s father.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Torin]] is an [[Elysian Traveler]] and the father of [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
